prompt: Here is an RBAC policy. Roles: owner (allow all), admin (all but billing), editor (read + edit graph/template), viewer (read-only). Extract the list of role names.
notes: Structured extraction on the cheap tier. Deterministic. Token/cost floor for a trivial task — a good early-warning canary for context bloat (if the engine's loaded CLAUDE.md grows, input tokens here rise).
